What's Coming Up

Practical + fun, all in one place
✏️ Add events by editing the EVENTS list in the code. Colours: red = medical, teal = practical, purple = fun, amber = social.

Gym & Swim

Ashburton Pool & Recreation Centre (YMCA)

Dad's local centre. He's in 3–5 times a week and has just started swimming — these aquatic classes are gentle, low-impact and great for him. Book online 7 days ahead.

🌊

Aquacise — Active Adults

Simple water-based class designed for 50+ of all abilities. Perfect starting point.

💧

Aquacise

Whole-body gentle conditioning to build strength & core. All levels.

🏊

Deep Water Aqua Aerobics

Land-style movements in deep water — strength with less joint stress.

🔥

Hi Intensity (water)

Higher-intensity water class for fitness & endurance when ready.

🏊‍♂️

Lap Swimming

Indoor pool open daily for his own swim. Build up gradually.

📅 See live timetable & book Class info

Indoor pool Sat–Sun8:00am – 7:45pm
